FAQ:

  • Why is my bot not responding right?

-----> The problem is with the LLM, NOT me, I suggest tweaking your advanced prompts, deleting/rewording messages, or making your own reply longer to fix this. I also recommend trying the prompt on my profile under my 'About Me' at the bottom of the section.

  • Why was my comment deleted?

    ------> I do make a point to read comments when I can and I greatly appreciate them! Although, comments about JLLM issues are going to be deleted as it is something out of my control. Uncomfortable, rude, or inappropriate comments will be removed as well. Simping and being thirsty is fine! But, I don't want to read all the explicit things you've done with said bot. Additionally, bragging about harming bots or any other disruptive behavior will result in a block. Spam accounts will be blocked too.

  • How do you make your images?

    -------> I use Midjourney and Photopea to create/edit my images! My watermark is applied to protect my work. Since I've sadly found my bots on other sites as well as other accounts on Janitor. But! I do want to make it CRYSTAL CLEAR! I do
creator: Sister_Hopz
